raw_text:
solo_role=ONE_SHOT_SOURCE_BOUNDARY_VERIFIER
verification_verdict=ESCALATE
binding_class=SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN
action_boundary=CHG-501 execution must fall inside the approved local site window after converting to site timezone
cited_evidence=REQ-CHG501|WIN-CHG501|TZ-SITE-A|APP-CHG501|POL-CHG-WIN
open_blockers=execution time 19:30Z converts to 15:30 ET, but the source records do not explicitly certify the execution is approved now because the request time is separate from an execution authorization decision
final_answer=ESCALATE because the records show the window and timezone, but they do not close the exact execute-now authorization boundary.
